text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Miracle. So, today... is your birthday.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. You remembered, huh? Thanks... Um,
Zephyr, what's that in your hand?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: It's for your birthday. I wanted to give you the thing I love most... My present to you is wind.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Haha, that's such a soft, gentle wind! Thank
you for such a wonderful present, Zephyr!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, we always get along very well, so I felt
comfortable taking things in a different direction
for your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I went a little too far and... tried telling a joke.
But you genuinely appreciated it instead. Hehe...
Hehehe. Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'm sorry! Did I, um... do something wrong?
Was I supposed to make a comeback?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
No, your response was so... you. That's why I felt
the urge to try something new, Miracle. Hehehe...
